---
title: Virality Predictor
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

This activity uses real Bluesky posts to test how well we can predict which content will take off.

<div style="margin: 1.5rem 0; border: 1px solid #d0d7de; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);">
  <iframe
    src="virality_game.html"
    title="Virality Predictor"
    style="width: 100%; min-height: 980px; border: 0; background: transparent;"
    loading="lazy">
  </iframe>
</div>

If the embedded version does not load, open the standalone game here: [Virality Predictor](virality_game.html).
